response.justification: While Bogdan has extensive experience in software development, including embedded systems (e.g., robotics, mobile development, and low-latency apps), his resume lacks direct evidence of C programming for embedded networking, kernel modification, or security technologies like MACsec or 802.1X. His recent roles at Google and Meta focus on web/mobile stacks (TypeScript, Node.js, React) rather than embedded C or networking security. Japanese language proficiency is not mentioned, which is a critical requirement.
strengths: Strong embedded systems experience (robotics, low-latency apps, DLang)
Proven ability in system-level development and optimization
Diverse technical background (C/C++, Java, JavaScript, Python-like languages)
concerns: No clear evidence of C programming for UNIX/embedded systems in recent roles
Lacks experience with Linux kernel modification or security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X)
Japanese language proficiency not demonstrated; English-only communication history
